hypothesis: A pain-led CTA ('احصل على Business OS Score') converts more visitors than a product-led CTA ('جرب أداة AI').
Showing a Sample Command Pack before price increases diagnostic bookings.
A sector-specific landing page (consulting) gets higher reply rate than the generic page.
The Revenue Leakage Calculator generates more qualified leads than the generic Business OS Score for B2B services.
A 7-day nurture sequence after a low score (<50) books more diagnostics than a single follow-up.
A founder build-log LinkedIn post drives more profile-to-tool clicks than a framework post.
A case-safe proof story (anonymized) outperforms a pure framework post on reply rate.
A partner one-pager sent to 5 marketing agencies yields at least 1 referral conversation.
Honest scarcity ('we accept 3 Command Sprints this month') increases close rate vs no scarcity.
A 3-tier pricing presentation with a 'Recommended' middle option lifts average order value vs single price.
